title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear parachutes into one of the most remote parts of New Zealand and battles unpredictable conditions as he crosses the country's highest mountain range.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the lethal jungle of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show you how to get out alive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls introduces his crew, including his fearless cameraman and recounts the challenges they face during their adventures.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the lethal mangroves and infamous viper pits of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show how to get out alive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear is dropped into the Chugach Mountains of Alaska, where he tries to withstand extreme temperatures, navigate forests and avoid territorial black bears.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
subTitle: At the Old Hollywood-themed pageant, tempers run high as competitive pageant mom Marina is convinced the pageant director is conspiring against her 5-year-old.

title: The Perfect Murder
subTitle: Film executive and former star UCLA basketball player Gavin Smith goes missing. For years, his family and detectives seek answers, but those questioned remain silent.

title: Anni: The Honeymoon Murder
subTitle: Authorities extradite Shrien to South Africa to stand trial for murder. When the trial begins, Shrien's defense team makes an opening revelation that stuns the prosecution and journalists alike.

title: XXX: State of the Union
subTitle: Darius Stone, a former US Navy SEAL, is recruited as a new agent in the XXX program to stop a rogue military faction from overthrowing the US government.

title: Underworld: Evolution
subTitle: Vampire warrior Selene and the half-werewolf Michael search for hints to understand the history of their races and the intense conflicts between them.

title: Men in Black II
subTitle: Agent J is after a shapeshifting alien seeking a powerful but little-known object. To save the world, he must reunite with his former partner, Agent K.

title: The Matrix Reloaded
subTitle: Neo and his allies navigate a series of deadly challenges, uncovering secrets of the Matrix and testing their limits to protect humanity from total annihilation.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
subTitle: Frodo sets out with The Fellowship of the Ring, led by Gandalf and Aragorn, and six other companions to Sauron's stronghold, Mordor, the only place where the Ring of Power can be destroyed.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

subTitle: In the icy weather of Patagonia, the survival expert reveals the hidden dangers that make survival so difficult and demonstrates how to build a snow cave.

subTitle: Mike and Marcus, the Miami Police Department detectives, investigate the flow of drugs into Miami. Their search leads them to a dangerous drug lord who is planning to control the city's drug trade.

title: Bad Boys
subTitle: Marcus, a family man and Mike, a ladies' man, are partners in the Miami police department. Later, things get complicated when they assume each other's identity while investigating a drug deal.

subTitle: A group of people tries to survive while a dying city gets overrun by zombies.

subTitle: Mountaineers survive in the Alps in potentially fatal conditions.

subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

subTitle: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.

subTitle: Bear chops his way into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 tsunami and must navigate his way out, facing deadly lizards, snakes, waterfalls and steep cliffs.
